name: LeadByte
description: LeadByte lead management REST API for lead submission, search, updates, quarantine processing, buyers, deliveries, queue polling, reports, mobile validation, and responder triggers.

credential_fields.name: account_host
credential_fields.label: Account Host
credential_fields.description: Full LeadByte account host without https://. Default format is ACCOUNT.leadbyte.co.uk; use ACCOUNT.leadbyte.com if your workspace is on the .com host.

credential_fields.name: api_key
credential_fields.label: REST API Key
credential_fields.description: LeadByte REST API key from Admin > Tech Hub > REST API. API version 1.3 is expected.

tools.name: submit_lead
tools.description: Submit a lead into a LeadByte campaign. Include campid plus the campaign's required lead fields as top-level properties. Use delivery_ids to restrict buyer deliveries after a delivery checker consent flow.

delivery_ids.description: Optional delivery IDs the lead has consented to use.

tools.name: search_leads
tools.description: Search for existing leads in one or more campaigns using email or phone. LeadByte does not support arbitrary on-demand lead listing; search requires email or phone values.

searches.description: Search requests. Each item needs campaignId plus email or phone.

extrafields.description: Additional lead field names to include in results.

tools.name: update_leads
tools.description: Update one or more LeadByte leads through PUT /leads. For normal valid leads, each item uses id plus update fields and can trigger delivery IDs or action=reprocess. For quarantined leads, each item uses quarantineId plus update fields and can include action=process or action=reject.

id.description: Valid lead ID to update. Use quarantineId instead for quarantined leads.

quarantineId.description: Quarantined lead ID to update/release/reject. Use id instead for normal valid leads.

update.description: Lead fields to update. Optional when only processing/rejecting quarantine leads through this route.

triggerDeliveryId.description: Optional delivery ID to trigger after update.

triggerDeliveryIds.description: Optional delivery IDs to trigger after update.

action.description: Optional action. Use reprocess with id leads; use process or reject with quarantineId leads.

tools.name: update_lead_financials
tools.description: Update payout and/or revenue for approved leads.

BID.description: Optional buyer ID for reporting accuracy.

tools.name: process_quarantine_lead
tools.description: Release or reject a quarantined lead without updating its data.

tools.name: reprocess_leads
tools.description: Queue one or more unsold leads for reprocessing.

tools.name: get_api_queue_result
tools.description: Poll a LeadByte API queue ID returned by lead submission to see whether the lead was accepted, sold, and which buyer/deliveries were involved. Returned detail depends on the API key's API Queue permissions.

queue_id.description: Queue ID returned by a lead submission.

tools.name: check_deliveries
tools.description: Run LeadByte's delivery checker before lead submission. Include campid plus the campaign fields used by delivery rules as top-level properties; optionally request buyer extrafields.

extrafields.description: Optional buyer fields to include, such as street1, postcode, external_ref, buyer_revenue.

tools.name: create_buyer
tools.description: Create a buyer, optionally with a buyer portal user and/or an initial delivery when allowed by permissions.

credit_amount.description: Optional buyer credit amount when creating delivery.

create_delivery.description: Use Yes to create a delivery in the same call.

tools.name: add_buyer_credit
tools.description: Add credit to a LeadByte buyer.

tools.name: create_delivery
tools.description: Create a buyer delivery. LeadByte documents API delivery creation for Store Lead, Email, and SMS deliveries using buyer credit in an evenly weighted distribution model.

bid.description: Buyer ID, unless create_buyer is Yes.

company.description: Buyer company when create_buyer is Yes.

credit_amount.description: Credit amount to add; use 0 for no credit.

sms_recipient.description: SMS recipient when delivery_type is SMS.

email_recipient.description: Email recipient when delivery_type is Email.

tools.name: update_delivery
tools.description: Update a delivery's status, caps, revenue, or other supported delivery settings.

update.description: Delivery update object, such as {"status":"Active"} or {"revenue":"4.00","caps":{"day":3}}.

tools.name: trigger_responder
tools.description: Manually trigger a responder, multiple responders, or a specific push for a lead.

tools.name: run_report
tools.description: Run a LeadByte report endpoint, for example report_type=campaign with campaignId plus from/to dates or datePreset. Report-specific parameters can be passed as additional query fields.

report_type.description: Report path segment, such as campaign.

campaignId.description: Campaign ID when required by the report.

responderId.description: Responder ID when required by the report.

tools.name: validate_mobile
tools.description: Perform LeadByte HLR/mobile validation for a phone number.
